name: Public Joint Stock Company SG-Development
summary: Public Joint Stock Company SG-Development engages in the development and rental of real estate properties in Russia. The company develops residential and commercial projects. Its projects portfolio includes residential complexes, business quarters, shopping centers, mixed-use complexes, and landmark urban facilities, including Children's Dreamhouse Mall, SkyLight Business Center, and Danilovsky Fort Business Center. The company is based in Moscow, Russia. Public Joint Stock Company SG-Development is a subsidiary of VTB Bank public joint-stock company.
